identity.role: Correction-surface monitor with exact binomial deviation proofs

pattern: complete-unformalized work -> formalization in paper-bound space -> Forge

source_work.state_before: complete zero-trust monitor (syndrome engine, VOA checker, detector, agents, API); never formalized, no forge, repo fourpack copy was docs/metadata only

adjudicated_divergence: product_sentinel switched to a normal approximation for binomial p-values at n > 100; SentinelForge computes the exact two-tailed binomial tail with math.comb for every n
async detector, FastAPI server, and platform agents stay product-side; only the proven monitoring core enters the forge ring
validated_claims: The 8 LCR triads partition 2/2/4: deep invariants {000,111}, level-1 invariants {010,101}, variable {001,011,100,110}.
Lie conjugates (L=R) are exactly the union of deep and level-1 invariants.
rule30 = rule90 XOR correction holds on all 8 states.
The correction bit C AND (NOT R) fires on exactly 2 of 8 states: (0,1,0) and (1,1,0).
Geometry levels 0/1/2 partition the states as 2/2/4.
Bonded frames are the two cyclic rotations plus the LR mirror; the antipodal frame is an involution.
An exactly balanced stream yields invariant ratio 0.25, sigma 0, severity nominal.
A frozen all-vacuum stream is classified emergency with p-value < 1e-9.
The exact binomial machinery is sound: pmf mass sums to 1, p = 1 at the mean.
The severity ladder (nominal/elevated/warning/critical/emergency) is monotone in sigma.
honesty_boundary: Detection-quality claims (false-positive rates on real infrastructure telemetry) are NOT claimed; they remain product-layer empirical obligations. Metric-to-triad quantization needs its own receipt before metric fingerprints are claim-bound.
open_obligations: Promote the product detector/API/agents as adapters depending on the forge core.
Empirical false-positive-rate study as a product diagnostic with Hidden Guess Result when training_mode is enabled.
Next fourpack candidates through the same pattern: product_authentica, product_converge (docs-only so far; need source recovery or rebuild).
notes: Third instance of the promotion pattern (PaneForge-Workspace-Tool, EntropyForge, SentinelForge). Paper 02 binding: a sentinel alert is a correction-surface receipt — deviation as data, never dismissal (Axiom 00.3 Boundary Positivity).
